vision: Professional network intelligence tool — what GlassWire would look like if built for a power user who runs an AI stack

architecture.realtime: Supabase Realtime for live dashboard updates
architecture.speed_test: Client-side XHR to Cloudflare (browser) + server-side librespeed-cli (API routes)

database_schema.speed_results: id, session_id, download_mbps, upload_mbps, ping_ms, jitter_ms, isp, org, ip_masked, city, country, connection_type, vpn_detected, vpn_confidence, timestamp
database_schema.traffic_events: id, session_id, domain, size_kb, duration_ms, protocol, flagged, flag_reason, flag_severity, timestamp
database_schema.sessions: id, fingerprint, first_seen, last_seen, total_tests, best_download

stories.title: Database Setup + Supabase Schema
stories.description: Create all tables in Supabase via migration SQL. Set up RLS policies. Create TypeScript types from schema.

stories.title: Next.js API Routes — Speed Test Backend
stories.description: POST /api/speed/run — accepts test results from client, validates, stores to Supabase speed_results. GET /api/speed/history?session_id=X — returns last 50 tests for session. GET /api/speed/stats?session_id=X — returns best/avg/worst. All routes use Supabase service role key.

stories.title: Next.js API Routes — Traffic Analysis
stories.description: POST /api/traffic/log — batch insert traffic events to Supabase. POST /api/traffic/analyze — takes last 30 traffic events, sends to GPT-4.1 with structured prompt, returns plain English analysis + threat score 0-100 + specific flags. GET /api/traffic/summary?session_id=X — aggregate stats.

stories.title: Next.js API Routes — VPN + IP Intelligence
stories.description: GET /api/network/info — server-side: fetches ip-api.com (more reliable than ipapi.co), checks ISP against VPN fingerprint database (50+ known VPN/datacenter orgs), returns: isp, org, vpn_detected (bool), vpn_confidence (0-100), country, city, masked_ip, asn. Server-side is more accurate than browser WebRTC.

stories.title: Core Speed Test Engine — Real with Backend Storage
stories.description: Client-side: Real streaming XHR to Cloudflare, gauge updates every 200ms, stores result to /api/speed/run on completion. The gauge sweeps for real. Session ID generated on first visit (localStorage), passed to all API calls. Auto-runs on mount, every 60s after.

stories.title: Hero Dashboard — GlassWire-inspired Layout
stories.description: Single page. Hero: TWO large centered gauges (download + upload) with REAL data from completed tests. Below gauges: 3 key stats (Ping / Download / Upload) in large mono. ISP card showing VPN status, country, org — from /api/network/info. Speed history chart from Supabase (real persistent data across sessions). Design: premium dark, NOT neon-generic. Reference: GlassWire. Sharp typography, data density.

stories.title: Live Traffic Intelligence Panel
stories.description: PerformanceObserver feeds real browser requests. Batches every 10s to /api/traffic/log. Every 30s calls /api/traffic/analyze → GPT-4.1 returns plain English paragraph + threat score. Display: traffic summary paragraph at top (GPT-written, updates every 30s), threat meter 0-100, compact request list (domain, size, duration, protocol badge). Canvas animation optional and secondary — the GPT analysis IS the feature.

stories.title: Connection History — Real Persistent Data
stories.description: Fetches from Supabase via /api/speed/history. Shows: last 20 tests, date/time, download speed, upload, ping, VPN status, location. Area chart from real Supabase data. Best/worst/avg from real data. Location grouping: tests from same IP cluster shown as same 'session'. Export to CSV button.
